items.claim: Abdul Hussein has nine submission wins, eight of which are in the first round.
items.quote: the guy does have nine submission wins, eight of which are in the first round.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is the biggest test of Abdul Hussein's career.
items.quote: Cody Gibson is the biggest test of his career.

items.claim: Cody Gibson does not necessarily have the finishing ability that he would need here.
items.quote: I just don't think Cody Gibson has necessarily the finishing ability that he would need here.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein gives up some height and reach.
items.quote: Man Hussein does give up some height and reach

items.claim: Abdul Hussein makes up for his height and reach disadvantage with a speed advantage.
items.quote: I do think he makes up for it with the speed advantage
